text.title: Python Async Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service use an async framework on the hot path?

branch.question: Any sync drivers on the hot path?

conclusion.verdict: replace with async drivers or to_thread offload
wrap in Semaphore + TaskGroup with max_parallel
ensure asyncio.timeout on every network await

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
